eligible_applicant_type: coalitions led by a nonprofit organization
project_area: food security systems, infrastructure, and access to healthy food
demographic_requirements: nonprofits and coalitions serving New Jersey communities, with priority for equitable, long-term solutions to food insecurity
eligibility_summary: Nonprofit organizations and coalitions (including those with government or for-profit partners) working in New Jersey to test, build, or scale innovations that strengthen food security. Excludes individuals, for-profit entities, government entities, partisan organizations, capital campaigns, and inconsistent food distributions without a broader strategy.
